final:
module SRAM (
    input [7:0] D,
    input [7:0] A,
    input WE,
    input RE,
    output reg [7:0] Q
);
    reg [7:0] memory [255:0]; // 256 x 8-bit memory

    always @(*) begin
  if (WE) begin memory[A] <= D ; // Write data to memory
  end
  end

  always @(*) begin
  if (RE) begin Q <= memory[A] ; // Read data from memory
  end
  end
endmodule
